[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001101010 4
1 0001001111 5
2 1011001100 5
3 1000001110 4
4 0000011000 2
5 1111110100 7
6 0111110101 7
7 1001101010 5
